name: Surface Control
description:
Control Microsoft Surface hardware from the Quick Settings panel.

Switch platform profiles (Low Power, Balanced, Balanced Performance, Performance) with a single tap. Changes made by external tools are reflected instantly via a kernel sysfs monitor.

* Platform profiles with Quick Settings tile and panel indicator
* Discrete GPU status (Surface Book with dGPU)
* Surface Book 2 clipboard detachment controls

Requires the linux-surface kernel. See the project URL for setup instructions.
